headline: Stock Market Today, March 6: Energy Stocks Rise as Oil Closes Over $90 on Middle East Tensions
summary: Energy names climb while most U.S. stocks retreat on stagflation fears and war-driven oil gains, today, March 6, 2026.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Diamondback Energy (FANG) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Run
summary: Wondering if Diamondback Energy is still fairly priced after a strong run, or if the current share price is giving you a margin of safety worth considering? The stock last closed at US$179.04, with returns of 7.2% over 7 days, 9.9% over 30 days, 17.5% year to date, 31.5% over 1 year, 42.9% over 3 years and 163.2% over 5 years. This naturally raises questions about what is already reflected in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Diamondback Energy's position within the US energy sector...

headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading higher amid the continuing Middle East conflict and expectations for a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz shipping chokepoint by Iran. Also, reports suggest Iran attacked a US-owned tanker near Kuwait.
